summary: Committed and pushed all multi-theme UI system changes with Windows taskbar integration. Features implemented: 14 theme combinations (7 themes × light/dark), Windows taskbar overlay with percentage display using custom bitmap font rendering, reusable UI component library (Card, Button, Badge, ProgressCircle, ThemeSelector), fixed Electron runtime issues (preload path from index.js to index.cjs, added nativeImage to patch script exports), updated HistoryChart with Million units and working time range selector, removed HistoryChart from main app as Session Used already shows the data, packaged as Windows .exe with proper app name display, added WCAG AA accessibility compliance, updated README documentation.
current_status: All changes committed and pushed to master branch - Ready for use
features_implemented: Multi-theme system with 14 combinations (7 themes × 2 variants)
Windows taskbar overlay with percentage text display
Electron runtime fixes (preload path, nativeImage exports)
HistoryChart with Million units and time range selector
Packaged Windows .exe with proper app name
